ofertaDesc.label: Services
ofertaDesc.description: ZRE ELKO provides services in full scope — from design, through manufacturing, installation, modernisation and overhauls of boilers, pipelines, turbine sets and other auxiliary installations, up to commissioning, operator training and handover.
ofertaDesc.permissionsText: For construction, modernisation and overhaul works, the Company holds relevant authorisations issued by UDT, TÜV and ASIT/SVTI.
items: Steam and hot-water coal-fired boilers with capacities up to approx. 50 MW or 60 t steam/h
Complete biomass steam boilers fired with wood chips and RDF
Pressure elements: water heaters, steam superheaters, membrane walls, headers, reduction stations, tees, flanges, manifolds and others

about.label: About us
about.description: A company based in Racibórz, specialising in manufacturing, modernisation and installation services in professional and industrial power engineering — in Poland and abroad.

tiles.title: History & profile
tiles.text: March 1991 marks the beginning of ZRE ELKO Sp. z o.o.'s operations. Our core profile is the design from scratch, manufacturing, installation and commissioning of water and steam boilers. We specialise in boilers fired with coal, gas, RDF and biomass fuels.

tiles.title: Full service scope
tiles.text: ZRE ELKO delivers tasks in full scope — from design, through manufacturing, installation, modernisation and overhauls of boilers, pipelines and auxiliary installations, to commissioning, operator training and handover of power engineering systems.

tiles.title: Authorisations & reach
tiles.text: We hold UDT, TÜV and ASIT/SVTI authorisations. Assembly personnel hold E and D qualifications. We operate in Poland and abroad — Germany, France, Austria, Czech Republic, Great Britain, Switzerland, Sweden, India, Belarus, Ukraine and Finland.

oferta.heading: Services
oferta.subheading: Comprehensive services for professional and industrial power engineering.

page.label: Services
page.intro: ZRE ELKO delivers tasks in full scope — from design, through manufacturing, installation, modernisation and overhauls of boilers, pipelines and auxiliary installations, to commissioning and handover. All work is performed with UDT, TÜV and SVTI/ASIT authorisations.
page.biuroIntro: The ZRE ELKO In-house Design Office has the competences to design boilers for various fuels — coal, natural gas, biomass, municipal waste, alternative fuels (RDF, pre-RDF) — from concept design, through basic design, up to detailed engineering. We design boilers according to PN-EN 12952-3, PN-EN 12953-3 and WUDT/UC/2003.
biuroParagraphs: We also have full competences to design various types of pipelines according to PN-EN 13480.

In addition to projects for ZRE ELKO's own manufacturing and installation activities, we provide boiler design services to our European partners — companies from Germany, Belgium, Austria, Czech Republic and France — produced by other European manufacturers.

Furthermore, the In-house Design Office provides all types of services consisting in the preparation of technical analyses and expert opinions commissioned by external Clients in the field of boiler and component design.
biuroHighlights: Boilers for coal, gas, biomass, RDF and pre-RDF
Technical expert opinions and analyses on commission

items.title: Boiler manufacturing
items.description: Manufacturing of steam and hot-water boilers for coal, gas, biomass, municipal waste and alternative fuels (RDF, pre-RDF) with capacity up to 50 MW or 60 t steam/h.

items.title: Installation & modernisation
items.description: Comprehensive installation, overhaul and modernisation of boilers, pipelines and auxiliary systems at power engineering facilities — in Poland and abroad.

items.title: Industrial pipelines
items.description: Construction of industrial pipelines according to PN-EN 13480 — from concept design, through basic design, to installation and acceptance with UDT, TÜV and SVTI authorisations.

items.title: ELKO Design Office
items.description: Full technical documentation for boilers according to PN-EN 12952-3, PN-EN 12953-3 and WUDT/UC/2003 — for own production and European partners from Germany, Belgium, Austria, Czech Republic and France.

realizacje.heading: Projects
realizacje.subheading: Projects we have completed with full commitment.

items.title: Boiler modernisation — Halle (Germany)
items.description: Comprehensive modernisation of a steam boiler at an energy facility in Halle. The scope of work included replacement of pressure elements, pipelines and thermal insulation.

items.title: Process pipelines — Kluczewo
items.description: Installation of high-pressure process pipelines in accordance with PN-EN 13480. Prefabrication and on-site assembly with full UDT inspection scope.

items.title: Major overhaul — Kruszwica 2024
items.description: Major overhaul of a steam boiler at the Kruszwica plant. Replacement of membrane walls, repair of superheaters and combustion system modernisation to meet current emission standards.

items.title: Boiler production — Küssnacht (Switzerland)
items.description: Manufacture of pressure components for a steam boiler for a Swiss partner. Execution in compliance with SVTI/ASIT standards and requirements of the Swiss technical inspection authority.

items.title: Plant installation — Malbork
items.description: Installation of energy systems at a facility in Malbork. Work covered pipeline installation, valves and auxiliary systems in accordance with the technical documentation.

items.title: Modernisation — Munkedal 2024 (Sweden)
items.description: Modernisation of a biomass boiler at the Munkedal facility. Replacement of pressure elements and pipelines with adaptation to new operating parameters.

items.title: Biomass boiler — Poznań
items.description: Manufacture and installation of a wood-chip biomass boiler for a client in Poznań. The installation includes a modern fuel-feeding system and flue-gas dedusting.

items.title: Steam boiler — Wyszków
items.description: Comprehensive delivery of a steam boiler for an energy plant in Wyszków. The scope covered design, manufacture of pressure elements, installation and commissioning.

items.title: Modernisation — Benkovec (Serbia)
items.description: Modernisation of a boiler installation at an industrial facility in Benkovec. Supply and assembly of pressure elements and pipelines in accordance with the execution design.

items.title: Process pipelines — Dąbrowa Górnicza
items.description: Prefabrication and installation of process pipelines at an energy facility in Dąbrowa Górnicza. Work executed in compliance with PN-EN 13480 with UDT inspections.

items.title: Steam boiler — Gliwice
items.description: Manufacture and installation of a steam boiler for an industrial plant in Gliwice. Full project scope — from technical documentation through inspections and commissioning.

items.title: Steam boiler — Kruszwica 2010
items.description: Manufacture and installation of a steam boiler for an industrial plant in Kruszwica. Full project scope — from detail design through commissioning and operator training.

items.title: Pilot boiler OS-5 — Total Refinery, Lacq (France)
items.description: Design, manufacture, supply and installation of the OS-5 heat recovery boiler for Total Refinery in Lacq — pilot fluidised-bed waste gasification plant. Commissioned January 2009.

items.title: Pipelines — Lacq 2011 (France)
items.description: Continuation of pipeline works at the Lacq site. Installation of high-pressure systems and valves in compliance with European standards.

items.title: Biomass boiler — Lenzing (Austria)
items.description: Supply of pressure components for a biomass boiler at an industrial plant in Lenzing. Execution in compliance with SVTI/ASIT standards and Austrian market requirements.

items.title: Biomass boiler — Munkedal 2021 (Sweden)
items.description: Supply and assembly of biomass boiler components for a Swedish industrial plant. Project completed in 2021 in accordance with European technical standards.

items.title: Process pipelines — Płock
items.description: Fabrication of high-pressure process pipelines at a facility in Płock. The scope included design, prefabrication, on-site assembly and UDT inspections.

items.title: Auxiliary installations — Rybnik
items.description: Installation of auxiliary boiler-system components in Rybnik. The scope of work covered feed-water pipelines, drains, vents and control valves.

items.title: Steam boiler — Siekierki
items.description: Manufacture and installation of a steam boiler at Elektrociepłownia Siekierki. Comprehensive scope — membrane walls, superheaters, water preheaters and steam pipelines.

items.title: Two-pass heat recovery boiler — Sokołów (Czech Republic)
items.description: Manufacture and delivery of a two-pass heat recovery boiler for a Czech client: 18 t/h steam, 415°C. Delivered as a single 35-tonne block in April 2008.

items.title: Biomass CHP OS-14 + 2×XU-8.5 — Wałcz
items.description: Biomass combined heat and power plant in Wałcz: OS-14 boiler (14 t/h, 4.5 MPa, 460°C) + 2 heat recovery boilers XU-8.5 (11 t/h each) + ~7 MW turbogenerator. Investor M-PLUS, GC AWBUD.

items.title: Modernisation — Zbiersk
items.description: Modernisation of a steam boiler at an energy facility in Zbiersk. Replacement of pressure elements and adaptation of the installation to current technical standards.

items.title: Steam boiler — Zduńska Wola
items.description: Manufacture and installation of a steam boiler for an industrial plant in Zduńska Wola. Full project scope — from detail design through commissioning and operator training.

items.title: Boiler assembly — Zülpich (Germany)
items.description: Assembly of a steam boiler at an industrial facility in Zülpich. Execution in compliance with TÜV standards with full testing and acceptance for the German market.

projects.title: Investment in the development and implementation of innovative R&D, production and IT infrastructure for the manufacturing of modern energy boilers
projects.program: Regional Operational Programme of Silesian Voivodeship 2007–2013
projects.tagline: Regional Operational Programme of Silesian Voivodeship – a real response to real needs
projects.infoText: Project co-financed by the European Union from the {source} under the {program}.

projects.title: Preparation of the necessary design and technological background for the introduction of a line of gas boilers with an innovative burner system into production
projects.description: The aim of the project is to develop production activities along with their internationalisation through the development of the design and manufacturing technology for gas-fuelled boilers using multi-fuel burners. The project focuses on implementing solutions enabling the burner to be seated in a specialised socket and modern finned flue-gas-to-water and flue-gas-to-air heat exchangers — reducing pollutant emissions and increasing energy efficiency.

footer.description: Manufacturing, modernisation and installation services in professional and industrial power engineering — in Poland and abroad.
